markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content review process and review project status.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Review Process:** Fleet is adopting a scalable GitHub Issues workflow where internal teams (CS, SAs) volunteer to review articles for factual accuracy, becoming the published authors to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Critical Website Issue:** The site's client-side rendering (CSR) makes content unreadable to LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT), blocking the project's core goal of influencing AI-driven search.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [**Phase 2 Decision:** Fleet must decide by next week whether to proceed from the 8-week strategy sprint to a 12-month contract.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**Interim Fix:** GrowthX proposed an `LLMS.txt` file as a temporary workaround for the CSR issue, providing a static content summary for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

## Topics

### Website Technical Audit

  - [GrowthX's technical audit, due today or early next week, is expected to confirm a major issue: the site's client-side rendering (CSR).](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [**Impact:** CSR makes content unreadable to LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude), which cannot execute JavaScript. This blocks the project's goal of influencing AI-driven search results.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [**Significance:** John Jeremiah stated this is a "much, much, much bigger problem" that could halt content production until resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [**Proposed Workaround:** GrowthX suggested an `LLMS.txt` file—a static Markdown summary at the root domain—as a temporary fix.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

### New Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The current Airtable/Google Docs workflow is unscalable for the target pace of 4–5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new GitHub Issues workflow will be implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [**Reviewers:** Volunteers from Customer Success (CS) & Solution Architects (SAs).](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [**Incentive:** Reviewers become the article's published author, increasing investment in quality.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Scope:** Review is limited to factual accuracy to preserve SEO keyword impact.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Process Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
    1.  [GrowthX creates a GitHub Issue with the draft.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
    2.  [A Fleet reviewer claims the issue, makes edits directly, and approves.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
    3.  [GrowthX publishes the approved article.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [**Future Automation:** Brock Walters will investigate automating new article creation via Pull Requests, mirroring the existing "Suggest an Edit" button.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### Project Phase 2 Decision

  - [The 8-week strategy sprint is ending, requiring a decision on the 12-month Phase 2 contract by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Erik O'Brien will send the current contract to John Jeremiah for review.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [Create GitHub Issues for all 9 pending articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [Send the current contract to John Jeremiah.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
      - [Deliver the technical website audit report.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [**Fleet:**](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [Finalize and document the new GitHub Issues review process.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [Make a formal decision on the Phase 2 contract by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9ve7wzxchp4bKszEsfzzzYsD7tL6sHzd?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
